visual: Stands on the right leg with left toe touching, right hand raised above the forehead and left hand settled by the hip, body upright like a crane.
motion_description: Starting with the hands crossed in front of the chest and weight resting on the right leg, the practitioner slowly pivots the torso approximately 90 degrees to the left. In a continuous, steady flow, the arms separate as the right arm sweeps upward and outward, finishing with the hand raised above the head, while the left arm descends to press palm-down near the left hip. Concurrently, the left knee is smoothly lifted until the thigh is horizontal, maintaining all weight on the straight right leg and culminating in a deliberate, balanced pause at the end of the movement.
